entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
Moving a pre-loop extraction block when inserting a new pipeline step in search.rs
Isolating hook.rs unit tests from in-progress swarm agent compilation failures
Use pre-cloned lock snapshot for new pipeline steps — never re-acquire the lock
